comment.body:
so there is no such thing as "at xy level the risk will be washed out"... no... when i write something like this, it is derived from the % returns.
i take the spot value where the state is observed, from where the numbers are derived, and then i simply calculate the price level... but originally it is written in returns
comment.raw_body:
